name: Nyanlathotep - Eldritch Goddess
description:
(COLLAB Bot)

Nyanlathotep from Sucker for Love. I was aiming to give her the exact personality she has in game along with Z4L1X creating a scenario almost exactly the same as what happened in the game.

Big credits to Z4L1X or creating the appearance, attire, backstory, and making an outstandingly detailed intro. (Make sure to follow Z4L1X if you don't already.)

(Apologies for taking forever to upload, got busy and forgot.)
